name: @layerzerolabs/onesig-stellar-contracts
description: Stellar Soroban contracts for LayerZero OneSig protocol

scripts.build:contract: pnpm exec lz-tool stellar contract build --package onesig
scripts.build:contract:native: pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native stellar contract build --package onesig
scripts.build:mocks: pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo build --release --target wasm32v1-none -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory" stellar
scripts.build:mocks:native: pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native --script "cargo build --release --target wasm32v1-none -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory" stellar
scripts.lint: pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo fmt --package onesig --check && cargo clippy --package onesig -- -D warnings" stellar
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo fmt --package onesig && cargo clippy --package onesig --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged" stellar
scripts.test:contract: pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo test --package onesig" stellar
